items.line_en: Hi Sophia, someone asked me what I did yesterday and I froze. I didn't know the words.

coach.say: Hi Sophia, someone asked me what I did yesterday and I froze. I didn't know the words.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Hi Sophia, / someone asked me what I did yesterday and I froze. / I didn't know the words.

items.line_en: Don't worry Mark, talking about your day is easy. Let me tell you about my day yesterday, step by step.

coach.say: Don't worry Mark, talking about your day is easy. Let me tell you about my day yesterday, step by step.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Don't worry Mark, / talking about your day is easy. / Let me tell you about my day yesterday, / step by step.

items.line_en: Great, I will listen and ask questions. Perfect. Listen closely. I will speak slowly.

coach.say: Great, I will listen and ask questions. Perfect. Listen closely. I will speak slowly.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Great, I will listen and ask questions. / Perfect. Listen closely. I will speak slowly.

items.line_en: Yesterday, I woke up at 7 a.m. Did you get up immediately? No, I stayed in bed for 10 minutes.

coach.say: Yesterday, I woke up at 7 a.m. Did you get up immediately? No, I stayed in bed for 10 minutes.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Yesterday, I woke up at 7 a.m. / Did you get up immediately? No, I stayed in bed for 10 minutes.

items.line_en: Then I stretched my arms. Stretched. What does that mean? It means I extended my arms to wake up

coach.say: Then I stretched my arms. Stretched. What does that mean? It means I extended my arms to wake up
coach.hint: Chunk it: Then I stretched my arms. / Stretched. / What does that mean? / It means I extended my arms to wake up

items.line_en: my muscles, like this. After that, I got out of bed and went to the bathroom. What did you do there?

coach.say: my muscles, like this. After that, I got out of bed and went to the bathroom. What did you do there?
coach.hint: Chunk it: my muscles, like this. / After that, I got out of bed and went to the bathroom. What did you do there?

items.line_en: I brushed my teeth and washed my face with cold water to wake up. Okay, and then?

coach.say: I brushed my teeth and washed my face with cold water to wake up. Okay, and then?
coach.hint: Chunk it: I brushed my teeth and washed my face with cold water to wake up. / Okay, / and then?

items.line_en: Then I went to the kitchen and made coffee. Did you eat breakfast? Yes, I had oatmeal with fruit.

coach.say: Then I went to the kitchen and made coffee. Did you eat breakfast? Yes, I had oatmeal with fruit.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Then I went to the kitchen and made coffee. / Did you eat breakfast? / Yes, / I had oatmeal with fruit.

items.line_en: It was healthy and delicious. So you woke up, stretched, washed your face, and had oatmeal.

coach.say: It was healthy and delicious. So you woke up, stretched, washed your face, and had oatmeal.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It was healthy and delicious. So you woke up, / stretched, washed your face, and had oatmeal.

items.line_en: Exactly. After breakfast, I got dressed. I wore a white blouse and black trousers.

coach.say: Exactly. After breakfast, I got dressed. I wore a white blouse and black trousers.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Exactly. / After breakfast, / I got dressed. / I wore a white blouse and black trousers.

items.line_en: How did you get to work? I took the bus. It was very crowded.

coach.say: How did you get to work? I took the bus. It was very crowded.
coach.hint: Chunk it: How did you get to work? / I took the bus. / It was very crowded.

items.line_en: Crowded means many people? Yes, there were no seats, so I stood all the way.

coach.say: Crowded means many people? Yes, there were no seats, so I stood all the way.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Crowded means many people? / Yes, / there were no seats, / so I stood all the way.

items.line_en: I arrived at the office at 9 o'clock. I checked my emails first. Was it a busy morning?

coach.say: I arrived at the office at 9 o'clock. I checked my emails first. Was it a busy morning?
coach.hint: Chunk it: I arrived at the office at 9 o'clock. / I checked my emails first. / Was it a busy morning?

items.line_en: Yes, I had a meeting with my team. We discussed a new project. At 1 p.m. I had lunch with my

coach.say: Yes, I had a meeting with my team. We discussed a new project. At 1 p.m. I had lunch with my
coach.hint: Chunk it: Yes, I had a meeting with my team. / We discussed a new project. At 1 p.m. I had lunch with my

items.line_en: colleague Anna. Where did you eat? We went to a small cafe nearby. I ordered a chicken salad.

coach.say: colleague Anna. Where did you eat? We went to a small cafe nearby. I ordered a chicken salad.
coach.hint: Chunk it: colleague Anna. / Where did you eat? / We went to a small cafe nearby. / I ordered a chicken salad.

items.line_en: Did you talk about work? No, we talked about our weekend plans. It was a nice break.

coach.say: Did you talk about work? No, we talked about our weekend plans. It was a nice break.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Did you talk about work? / No, / we talked about our weekend plans. / It was a nice break.

items.line_en: I finished work at 6 p.m. and went to the supermarket. What did you buy?

coach.say: I finished work at 6 p.m. and went to the supermarket. What did you buy?
coach.hint: Chunk it: I finished work at 6 p.m. / and went to the supermarket. / What did you buy?

items.line_en: I bought some vegetables and milk. Then I went home.

coach.say: I bought some vegetables and milk. Then I went home.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I bought some vegetables and milk. / Then I went home.

items.line_en: Ugh, I was tired, so I didn't cook a big dinner. I just made a sandwich.

coach.say: Ugh, I was tired, so I didn't cook a big dinner. I just made a sandwich.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Ugh, / I was tired, / so I didn't cook a big dinner. / I just made a sandwich.

items.line_en: What did you do after dinner? I read a book for one hour. It helps me relax.

coach.say: What did you do after dinner? I read a book for one hour. It helps me relax.
coach.hint: Chunk it: What did you do after dinner? / I read a book for one hour. / It helps me relax.

items.line_en: And then? I brushed my teeth again and went to sleep at 10 p.m. So that was my day.

coach.say: And then? I brushed my teeth again and went to sleep at 10 p.m. So that was my day.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And then? / I brushed my teeth again and went to sleep at 10 p.m. / So that was my day.

items.line_en: I woke up, washed my face, worked, ate lunch, read a book, and slept.

coach.say: I woke up, washed my face, worked, ate lunch, read a book, and slept.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I woke up, washed my face, / worked, ate lunch, read a book, and slept.

items.line_en: Thank you, Sophia. Now I know how to describe my day.

coach.say: Thank you, Sophia. Now I know how to describe my day.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Thank you, / Sophia. / Now I know how to describe my day.

items.line_en: I'm so glad I could help. You really did.

coach.say: I'm so glad I could help. You really did.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I'm so glad I could help. / You really did.
